description.heading: BUILT FOR PRECISION
description.body: A precision benchtop tool that projects a green laser along your shooting lane — giving you a visible reference for placing wind flags exactly on the line of fire and at consistent heights.

description.heading: AT THE RANGE
items: Sight your scope on the target — line of fire locked in.
Turn on the laser — projects parallel to the scope, straight through the air.
Walk downrange with a board, your body, or the flag stand itself.
The green dot shows exactly where the line of fire passes at that distance.
Use the dot height to set the stand — flag goes on-line AND on elevation.

description.heading: WHY IT MATTERS
description.body: Most shooters get wind flags close, not exact. A flag five yards off the line of fire — or sitting at a different height than the next flag — gives you the wrong wind read. The AXIS makes every flag, at every distance, identically aligned. Trust your wind call.

description.heading: KEY FEATURES
items: 5W Green Laser
Picatinny rail — fits any standard scope
Integrated bubble level
Adjustable leveling feet
Knurled on/off dial for one-handed use
Weighted base for rock-solid stability
** Scope not Included

description.heading: WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT
items: Set your flags in minutes — no string lines
Same exact flag layout, range after range
Confidence in every wind call
Built in the USA by Choice Tactical

values.name: Single Stack
values.description: Holds 10 cartridges. One gravity-feed column with hex base.

values.name: Double Stack
values.description: Holds 20 cartridges. Two gravity-feed columns with hex base.

description.heading: BUILT FOR PRECISION
description.body: A bench top cartridge stack that keeps your loaded rounds upright, organized, and within reach. Gravity-fed columns dispense rounds in load order; the hex base holds six more rounds for a fast reload or a sighter set. No moving parts. No more rounds rolling across the bench. You have the option for a single stack (10 rounds) or a double stack (20 rounds).

description.heading: AT THE RANGE
items: Add the flexible arm and the bracket to mount the Stack to the thumbscrew of your front rest.
Drop prepared rounds into the slots — gravity holds them in column.
Reach in, grab the next round nose-up, chamber, fire.
Use the six base receivers for fouling shots, sighters, or a staged reload.
Wipe clean. Pack up. Repeat next match.

description.heading: WHY IT MATTERS
description.body: At a precision match the difference between a .25 MOA group and a .45 MOA group is often just rhythm — and rhythm breaks the moment you fumble for a round. Loose ammo rolls. Pocket carry dings bullet tips. Plastic boxes are slow and force you to look down. The Stack keeps your rounds in the same spot, in the same order, every shot, every relay. Eyes stay on the rifle. Cadence stays smooth.

description.heading: KEY FEATURES
items: Single or Twin gravity-feed columns — rounds dispense in load order
Six-position perimeter base — for sighters, fouling shots, or a quick reload stage
Flexible arm with bracket mount — locks rock-solid to a front rest
Sized for common benchrest rifle cartridges (6PPC, 6BR, 30BR or any variant of 6mm)
Matte finish — won't reflect into your scope or your neighbor's
Built in the USA by Choice Tactical
** Cartridges and rifle not included

description.heading: WHAT'S INCLUDED
items: Single or Double Stack
12" Flexible arm
Front Rest Bracket
